issue_title: bluesound_group attribute disappears if more than 2 devices are grouped
issue_body:
### The problem

The bluesound_group attribute shows the bluesound devices that are grouped with a master and a slave.  When a third device is added as a slave, the bluesound_group attribute disappears.

### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

2022.10

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

_No response_

### What type of installation are you running?

Home Assistant Container

### Integration causing the issue

_No response_

### Link to integration documentation on our website

_No response_

### Diagnostics information

_No response_

### Example YAML snippet

_No response_

### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us?

_No response_

### Additional information

Attributes from the master (with 2 slaves):
source_list: Spotify, Library, Radio Paradise, TuneIn, Spotify
volume_level: 0.29
media_content_type: music
media_duration: 106
media_position: 0
media_position_updated_at: 2022-10-06T15:08:07.475312+00:00
media_title: xxxx
media_artist: xxxxxx
media_album_name: xxxxxx
source: Library
shuffle: false
master: true
entity_picture: /api/media_player_proxy/media_player.bluesound_bedroom?token=xxxxxxxxxxxxxx&cache=xxxxxxxxxxxxxx
icon: /images/players/N100_nt.png
friendly_name: Bluesound Bedroom
supported_features: 196157
device_class: receiver

Attributes from a slave:
volume_level: 0.3
media_content_type: music
media_position_updated_at: 2022-10-06T15:10:07.865557+00:00
media_artist: Bluesound Bedroom + 2
shuffle: false
master: false
icon: /images/players/N100_nt.png
friendly_name: Bluesound Master Bedroom
supported_features: 1036
device_class: receiver
pr_title: Add core mediaplayer grouping to bluesound
pr_body:
<!--
  You are amazing! Thanks for contributing to our project!
  Please, DO NOT DELETE ANY TEXT from this template! (unless instructed).
-->
## Breaking change
Services bluesound.join and bluesound.unjoin is removed in favor of media_player.join and media_player.unjoin

## Proposed change
Remove the bluesound specific grouping functionality in favor of implementing Core grouping functionality


## Type of change
<!--
  What type of change does your PR introduce to Home Assistant?
